steps: Install xterm, @xterm/addon-fit, @xterm/addon-webgl packages
Install @types/node for Node.js type definitions
Configure TypeScript to include xterm types
Verify packages install cleanly with npm install

description: Define TypeScript types for terminal domain
steps: Create src/features/terminal/types/index.ts
Define TerminalSession type (id, name, pid, cwd, etc.)
Define TerminalTab type (sessionId, title, isActive)
Define PTYCommand types (spawn, write, resize, kill)
Define PTYEvent types (data, exit, error)
Write comprehensive type tests
Create src/features/terminal/services/terminalService.ts
Define ITerminalService interface (spawn, write, resize, kill methods)
Create MockTerminalService for testing
Create TauriTerminalService (invoke Tauri commands)
Implement service factory pattern (dev vs production)
Write service tests with mock implementation
Create src/features/terminal/components/TerminalPane.tsx
Initialize xterm.js terminal instance in useEffect
Configure Catppuccin Mocha theme for xterm
Add fit addon for responsive sizing
Add WebGL addon for performance
Handle terminal resize on container size change
Clean up terminal instance on unmount
Write TerminalPane.test.tsx

description: Create useTerminal hook for PTY lifecycle
steps: Create src/features/terminal/hooks/useTerminal.ts
Spawn PTY on mount via terminalService.spawn()
Listen to PTY data events and write to xterm instance
Handle keyboard input: xterm onData → terminalService.write()
Handle PTY exit events and cleanup
Handle PTY error events with user-friendly messages
Return terminal instance and status to component
Write useTerminal.test.ts with mock service
Update TerminalPane to use useTerminal hook
Pass sessionId and cwd props to TerminalPane
Connect xterm data events to PTY write
Connect PTY data events to xterm write
Handle terminal resize events (onResize → pty_resize)
Verify terminal renders and accepts input in dev mode
Write integration test: spawn → input → output

description: Update TerminalZone to use real TerminalPane
steps: Replace TerminalZone placeholder content with TerminalPane
Pass active session data to TerminalPane
Handle tab switching (unmount/mount TerminalPane instances)
Add + new tab button handler (create new terminal session)
Show loading state while PTY spawns
Show error state if PTY spawn fails
Write TerminalZone integration tests
Add portable-pty dependency to src-tauri/Cargo.toml
Create src-tauri/src/terminal/mod.rs module
Implement spawn_pty Tauri command (shell, cwd, env)
Return PtySession struct (id, pid)
Store active PTY sessions in Mutex<HashMap>
Handle spawn errors (invalid shell, permission denied)
Write Rust unit tests for spawn_pty
Implement write_pty Tauri command (session_id, data)
Lookup PTY session from state HashMap
Write bytes to PTY stdin
Handle write errors (session not found, PTY closed)
Write Rust unit tests for write_pty
Implement resize_pty Tauri command (session_id, rows, cols)
Lookup PTY session from state HashMap
Call PTY resize method
Handle resize errors (session not found, PTY closed)
Write Rust unit tests for resize_pty
Implement kill_pty Tauri command (session_id)
Lookup PTY session from state HashMap
Send SIGTERM to PTY process
Remove session from HashMap
Handle kill errors (session not found, already exited)
Write Rust unit tests for kill_pty
Spawn background task to read PTY stdout in loop
Emit pty-data Tauri event with session_id and output bytes
Emit pty-exit event when PTY process exits
Emit pty-error event on read errors
Handle backpressure (limit event queue size)
Write Rust integration tests for event streaming
Write integration test: spawn shell → echo hello → verify output
Test terminal resize works correctly
Test multiple terminal tabs (switch between them)
Test terminal cleanup on tab close
Test error handling (invalid shell, spawn failure)
Verify all PTY processes cleaned up after tests

description: Apply Catppuccin Mocha theme to xterm.js
steps: Create src/features/terminal/theme/catppuccin-mocha.ts
Define xterm theme with Catppuccin Mocha colors
Apply theme to xterm instance in TerminalPane
Verify terminal colors match design spec
Test theme in both light and dark system themes
Run npm run lint and fix all issues
Run npm run type-check and fix type errors
Run npm test and achieve 80%+ coverage
Run cargo clippy and fix all warnings
Run cargo test and ensure all Rust tests pass
Verify git hooks pass (pre-commit, commit-msg)
Verify: Can spawn a shell and interact with it
Verify: Can run `claude` (Claude Code) in terminal
Verify: Terminal resizes correctly on window resize
Verify: Multiple terminal tabs work (switch between)
Verify: PTY processes cleaned up on tab close / app exit
Verify: Catppuccin Mocha theme applied correctly
Verify: All tests pass, ESLint and Prettier clean
Verify: No memory leaks (PTY cleanup on unmount)
